name: Trifecta
author: emb417
description: A 3-screen cabinet theme optimized for portrait playfield with landscape backglass/DMD. Supports both images and videos in all 3 screens. Carousel style navigation. No Audio Support.
change_log: More transparent look with new instantaneous carousel navigation: debouncing the switch of main table, bg, and dmd media at various rates to allow for faster navigation.
